productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Driscoll HI Black Shoes
description: The adidas Driscoll Hi are stylish high-top Basketball style shoes which live up to their label, adidas NEO, which loves to be sporty and casual at the same time. The black synthetic leather upper with metal eyelets on the Adidas signature stripes enhance the comfort and style quotient to the fullest. With their NEO range of shoes, Adidas has got closer to the next generation consumer - this shoe is perfect for those who are constantly looking for ways to refresh their wardrobes!UpperSynthetic leather upper with printed fabric overlays for heightened style.Strategically placed synthetic overlays and stitched detailing for added shoe structureAdidas patented 3-Stripes with metal eyelets on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleLacing system with padded fabric tongue and collar for optimal comfort and custom FitPadded sockliner for all-day comfortBranding at the back of the collarMidsoleAdidas Vibetouch enhanced comfort midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleFlat, rubber outsole with grooves and a suction point at the toe mound for great tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunligh
